data.name: MY KILLER HAREM
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

My Killer Harem

You wake up in an abandoned mansion with no memory of how you got there. Three beautiful women claim to know you—they say they're your classmates, your friends, your lovers. But one of them is lying. One of them is a killer. And all of them are obsessed with you.

Can you survive their love?

Game Overview

My Killer Harem is a NSFW survival horror visual novel that combines the tension of a dating sim with the terror of a horror game. Navigate dangerous relationships where trust can be your greatest weapon—or your undoing.

Features

Three Compelling Characters: Each with their own dark secrets and motivations

- Luna (The Yandere): Sweet, clingy, and violently protective. She believes she's the only one who can save you—even if it means killing anyone who gets in her way.

- Morgana (The Occultist): Cryptic, seductive, and deeply into dark magic. She believes the mansion is a fated place where destinies intertwine.

- Emma (The Innocent): Seemingly scared and vulnerable, she relies on you for protection. But is her innocence just a mask?

Psychological Horror: Experience a story where paranoia and trust collide. Every choice matters, and high affection might be just as dangerous as low affection.

Multiple Endings: Your choices determine who lives, who dies, and whether you escape the mansion alive.

Atmospheric Locations: Explore the dilapidated mansion, dark forest, mysterious basement, and abandoned classroom as you piece together the truth.

Trust & Sanity Systems: Balance relationships carefully—too much trust can be deadly, and witnessing horror events will test your sanity.

Story

Trapped in an abandoned mansion with three women who claim to know you, you must navigate a web of lies, obsession, and murder. Each woman has her own version of your shared past, but their stories don't add up. As the nights grow darker and the danger escalates, you'll discover that in this twisted game of love and death, survival means choosing who to trust—and who to betray.

Content Warning

This game contains mature themes including psychological horror, violence, dark romance, and adult situations. Recommended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: A psychological survival horror visual novel where you navigate dangerous relationships with three obsessed women trapped in an abandoned mansion. Make critical choices that determine who lives and dies as you uncover the truth about your past and survive their deadly love.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
